referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Full-width split hero with left-aligned headline and CTA cluster, doctor/patient photo on the right, soft blue gradient treatment.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Friendly sans-serif with large headline and compact supporting copy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Trust row directly below hero in three to four columns with icon + short value text.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Centered six-card service grid (3x2 desktop) with icon, title, and concise description.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Doctor-focused two-column panel with bio text left and portrait image right on a tinted background.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Three compact testimonial cards with stars and author names in a single row.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Hero light gradient -> trust strip white cards -> services on white -> doctor section tinted blue -> testimonials white -> contact CTA light blue -> dark footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Comfortable and airy spacing with clear section separations.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded pill CTAs using solid primary blue and outlined secondary variants.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Primary blue used for headlines, CTAs, and icons; accent aqua used for highlights; backgrounds remain white to light blue.

sections.heading: Neighborhood roots with modern dental care.
